items.name: BALLISTIC VEST
items.description: Woven from tough fibers, a ballistic vest is designed primarily to stop fragmentation, although it's also useful in stopping light handgun rounds.

items.name: CHAINMAIL
items.description: Most forms of medium weight metal armor fall into this category, including scale and brigandine

items.name: LARGE SHIELD
items.description: An attacker must win （not tie)a Simple Test in order to strike a character protected by a large shield in Melee combat. Thrown or missile weapons (but not firearms) can also be blocked with large ' shields
items.notes: Bonus Traits: 1; Negative Traits: Heavy, Clumsy

items.name: LEATHER ARMOR
items.description: Hardened leather armor, or significant layers of soft leather can be worn over most vital parts of the body to absorb some blows.

items.name: PLATE MAIL
items.description: Plate mail armor overlapping metal plates with chain reinforcement is the sort of armor people envision When they think of traditional knights in the Middle Ages.

items.name: REINFORCED VEST
items.description: for dangerous assignments, soldiers or police officers sometimes use a ballistic vest with

items.name: RIOT SHIELD
items.description: Riot shields are transparent, so that the user can see through the shield itself Rt shs tt agant weapons, thrown weapons and even fists Special Ability: Attackers must win a Simple Test in order to actually strike a character using a riot shield. Description: Riot shields are transparent, so that the user can see through the shield itself Rt shs tt agant weapons, thrown weapons and even fists
items.notes: Bonus Traits: 1; Negative Traits: Heavy, Clumsy

items.name: SMALL SHIELD
items.description: Against Melee weapons, missile weapons or thrown weapons (but not firearms), the shield forces the attacker to make a Simple Test; the attacker must win or tie to actuallystrike the user of the shield.

items.name: HOLYWATER
items.description: Properly blessed and consecrated holy water can purify and wash away taint, and it also serves as a potent weapon against the unliving. Some faiths use incense or wafers with similar capabilities. Special Ability: Holy water blessed by an individual with True Faith x 5 inflicts aggravated wounds upon vampires. Description: Properly blessed and consecrated holy water can purify and wash away taint, and it also serves as a potent weapon against the unliving. Some faiths use incense or wafers with similar capabilities.

items.name: DIRECTIONAL MICROPHONE
items.description: Using a directional microphone allows a character to over hear a conversation in another room or up to 20 feet away. for ease of play, it's usually best to let the player actually move to the location of the conversation.

items.name: HOLY SYMBOL
items.description: A holy symbol is a necessity for focusing True Faith. Holy symbols take various forms depending on the Faith of the wielder from ornate crucifixes to elaborate prayer wheels to colorful dream catchers Special Ability: A character must use a holy symbol to focus the powers of True Faith, unless he has the Merit: Symbol Independence. Description: A holy symbol is a necessity for focusing True Faith. Holy symbols take various forms depending on the Faith of the wielder from ornate crucifixes to elaborate prayer wheels to colorful dream catchers

items.name: NIGHTVISION GOGGLES
items.description: The information processed By the goggles is rarely of a quality approaching normal vision, the wearer may have some difficulty picking out individual targets. Special Ability: Nightvision goggles negate the penalty for fighting in partial darkness, but since they rely on existing light, they are of no help in total darkness. Description: The information processed By the goggles is rarely of a quality approaching normal vision, the wearer may have some difficulty picking out individual targets.

items.name: STARLIGHT SCOPE
items.description: An active light enhancement assembly powered by a small battery allows the starlight scope to show a clearer monochromatic picture of a target at night. Special Ability: When fitted to a rifle, sirftl can beused tonegate the penalty Traits from partial darkness. how ever, the shooter must take a fullturn to aim the weapon in order to g a In this benefit. Description: An active light enhancement assembly powered by a small battery allows the starlight scope to show a clearer monochromatic picture of a target at night.

Special Ability: Destroy Shield: Hatchets render shields useless after three blows. items.name: GLAMOUR TRAIT
items.description: Ephemeral and intangible, Glamour is the energy of pure dream stuff used by faeries. Special Ability: One Glamour Trait is sufficient to: Enchant a mortal for one day; add a single Bunk to a can trip; heal one Health Level of normal chimerical damage; power certain can trips or Birthrights, as listed in The Shining Host.

items.name: LASER SIGHT one additional Bonus Trait to any firearm shooter spends a full turn aiming. Description: A laser sight improves the accuracy of a weapon by highlighting the target with a small pinpoint of reflected light. The sniper can easily line up a more accurate shot given proper time spent aligning the sight. Special Ability:A laser sight grants otherthan a shotgun, as long as the

items.name: PATHOS TRAIT
items.description: As shadows of the once living, wraiths can only hold on to the material world through the memory of their strongest passions. Special Ability: One Pathos Trait is sufficient to: Heal one Corpus Level of normal damage; power certain Arcanoi, as listed in Oblivion. Description: As shadows of the once living, wraiths can only hold on to the material world through the memory of their strongest passions.

items.name: WILLPOWER TRAIT
items.description: Strength of will is key in overcoming adversity or enforcing one's desires. Special Ability: One will power Trait is sufficient to: Ignore all wound penalties for one challenge; recover all lost Traits in one Attribute category once per game session; gain a retest when defending against a Mental or Social Challenge; power certain special abilities. Description: Strength of will is key in overcoming adversity or enforcing one's desires.

items.name: blood TRAIT
items.description: Blood sustains the undead and gives them power. This represents about a pint of blood. Special Ability: One Blood Trait is sufficient to: Heal one Health Level of normal damage; gain one temporary Physical Trait; turn a mortal into a ghoul for one month; sustain a vampire for one night; power certain Disciplines as listed in Laws of the Night. Description: Blood sustains the undead and gives them power. This represents about a pint of blood.

items.name: rage TRAIT
items.description: The rage of were wolves is mighty, turning them into creatures of incredible destructive power in combat. Special Ability: One Rage Trait is sufficient to: Change into another form immediately; take an extra action during a challenge; make a follow-up attack on a successful attack; heal one Health Level of damage after becoming Incapacitated; power certain Gifts as listed in Laws of the Wild. Description: The rage of were wolves is mighty, turning them into creatures of incredible destructive power in combat.

Description: Strength of will is key in overcoming adversity or enforcing one's desires.
